headline: J.B. Hunt Included in Dow Jones Best‑in‑Class North America Index
summary: LOWELL, Ark., May 07, 2026--J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. (Nasdaq: JBHT), one of the largest supply chain solutions providers in North America, announced today it has been included in the Dow Jones Best‑in‑Class North America Index following S&P Global’s 2025 Corporate Sustainability Assessment (CSA).

headline: Dividend Yields Are Scarce. Stock Buybacks May Fill the Gap.
summary: Stocks with hefty dividend yields have gotten harder and harder to find as more companies use buybacks to distribute extra cash.  Fund investors might want to follow their lead.  While the  is having another strong year, up 7.6% so far in 2026, dividends haven’t been a huge part of the picture.
